Class VacationModeConfig

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.VacationModeConfig
public class VacationModeConfig extends Object
Stores the active vacation mode configuration for the mock prototype.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VacationModeConfig(boolean enabled, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, String scheduleId)
    Creates a vacation mode configuration.
    VacationModeConfig(boolean enabled, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, LocalTime startTime, LocalTime endTime, String scheduleId)
    Creates a vacation mode configuration with date and time range.

  • Constructor Details

    • VacationModeConfig

      public VacationModeConfig(boolean enabled, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, String scheduleId)
      Creates a vacation mode configuration.
      Parameters:
      enabled - whether vacation mode is enabled
      startDate - configured start date
      endDate - configured end date
      scheduleId - selected schedule identifier

    • VacationModeConfig

      public VacationModeConfig(boolean enabled, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, LocalTime startTime, LocalTime endTime, String scheduleId)
      Creates a vacation mode configuration with date and time range.
      Parameters:
      enabled - whether vacation mode is enabled
      startDate - configured start date
      endDate - configured end date
      startTime - configured start time
      endTime - configured end time
      scheduleId - selected schedule identifier

  • Method Details

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Returns whether vacation mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      true when enabled, otherwise false

      public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Updates whether vacation mode is enabled.
      Parameters:
      enabled - updated enabled state

    • isConfigured

      public boolean isConfigured()
      Indicates whether the configuration contains the required schedule and date range.
      Returns:
